summary: Decent recording with solid sound but lacking low end, paired with an average performance and interesting set list
review: The show is described as average—interesting set list but the playing was good yet not great. The recording sounds pretty good overall, though it suffers from a thin low‑end response.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; the performance is judged average while the recording is considered decent, leading to a combined rating just above the midpoint.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recording sounds pretty good but lacks low‑end depth, making the bass feel thin.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Interesting set list but overall performance is described as average and not especially compelling.
